briefing: Markets were flat today with NASDAQ and S&P 500 both essentially unchanged (0.0%), showing no clear directional conviction. Despite several strong-scoring candidates (MANE, MAAS, HTFL, CWK) showing bullish technical setups, we're holding cash rather than forcing new buys on a neutral day. Per prior lessons, we'll wait for a genuine risk-on signal (NASDAQ +2% or more) before deploying the remaining $777 in cash into new positions.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Risk-off simply means investors are being cautious and holding back from making new bets when the market lacks clear direction. Instead of chasing every stock with a good-looking chart, a disciplined investor waits for stronger confirmation — like a broad market rally — before committing fresh cash. Patience on flat days protects capital for when real opportunities appear.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「風險規避」（Risk-Off）是指在市場缺乏明確方向時，投資者選擇保持謹慎、不輕易加碼新倉位。與其追逐每一隻圖表看似不錯的股票，有紀律的投資者會等待更強的確認訊號（例如大盤全面上揚）才投入新資金。在平淡的交易日保持耐性，能為日後真正的機會保留實力。

market_education.summary_en: Broad market indices closed essentially flat today, with no major catalyst driving direction in either the NASDAQ or S&P 500. Trading appears range-bound as investors await clearer signals before committing new capital. This kind of directionless session often precedes a bigger move once a catalyst emerges.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日大盤走勢持平，納斯達克指數與標普500指數均未見明顯升跌，市場缺乏明確方向。投資者似乎在等待更清晰的訊號才願意加碼新倉位，形成區間震盪格局。這類缺乏方向性的交易日，往往是市場醞釀下一波較大波動的前奏。
